name: attested-delivery
description: The attested-delivery Claude Code plugin marketplace. Every plugin is SHA-pinned, scanned across the org's quality gates, and admitted to this catalog only when its attestations verify fail-closed.

plugins.name: attested-reference
plugins.description: Reference plugin that exercises the attest/scan/verify pipeline end to end.

plugins.name: attested-delivery
plugins.description: Signed, SLSA-attested, fail-closed-verified releases — central reusable signing/seam/verify workflows and independent gh attestation verify.
